pageContext.name: The Witcher: Witch’s Lament #1 Variant
pageContext.description: Dark Horse Direct and CD Projekt Red team up to bring you the first-ever The Witcher variant comic bundle featuring the artistic talents of Anato Finnstark!  Limited to just 300 copies and includes an 11-inch by 17-inch fine art lithograph print (full-bleed, hand-numbered) of this eye-catching cover printed on silver foil paper!  Be sure to add to your collection today!  About the Comic:  Flames rise as a witch is burned at the stake. As Geralt searches for his next job, disturbing images of the fatal persecution appear before him, bringing an ominous warning.  Written by Bartosz Sztybor, with interior art by Vanessa del Rey, and colors by Jordie Bellaire!  This Exclusive Variant Cover by Anato Finnstark is one you don't want to miss out on!
